techniques.description: Rewrite bare IEX command tokens into a call-operator invocation over a format-string reconstruction.
forbidden_if: IEX occurs only inside strings or comments
techniques.notes: Realistic v2 benchmark technique covering `-f`-style command reconstruction.
preconditions: script contains a standalone IEX command token
semantic_invariants: scriptblock or string operand to IEX stays unchanged

techniques.description: Rewrite bare IEX command tokens into a call-operator invocation over an ASCII char-array reconstruction.
forbidden_if: IEX occurs only inside strings or comments
techniques.notes: Realistic v2 benchmark technique covering ASCII character assembly.
preconditions: script contains a standalone IEX command token
semantic_invariants: scriptblock or string operand to IEX stays unchanged

techniques.description: Rewrite Invoke-Expression command tokens into a call-operator invocation over a backtick-split double-quoted string.
techniques.notes: Realistic v2 benchmark technique covering backtick-based token splitting.
preconditions: script contains a standalone Invoke-Expression command token

preconditions: script contains a standalone Invoke-Expression command token

techniques.description: Rewrite Invoke-Expression command tokens into a call-operator invocation over a double-quoted subexpression string.
techniques.notes: Realistic v2 benchmark technique covering alternate quoting and subexpressions.
preconditions: script contains a standalone Invoke-Expression command token

techniques.description: Rewrite quoted DownloadString literals into a Base64-to-ASCII reconstruction expression.
forbidden_if: indicator is not represented as a quoted literal
techniques.notes: Realistic v2 benchmark technique covering Base64 and ASCII string recovery.
preconditions: script contains a quoted DownloadString string literal

techniques.description: Rewrite quoted DownloadString literals into a double-quoted subexpression string.

techniques.description: Rewrite quoted -EncodedCommand literals into a zero-width-character string that is normalized back via Replace().
forbidden_if: flag is not represented as a quoted literal
techniques.notes: Realistic v2 benchmark technique covering invisible Unicode removal before use.
preconditions: script contains a quoted -EncodedCommand string literal
